description: With Simmons and Daisy cornered, Robbie Reyes arrives and dramatically intervenes. He faces off against James, overtaking him with Ghost Rider’s superior power—a battle of fire against fire. The fight is explosive, literally triggering fireworks throughout the warehouse. Daisy and Simmons escape thanks to Robbie’s aid, and Coulson, Mack, and Simmons regroup just as the chaos concludes. Robbie drags an unconscious James out to them.

transcript.line: Huh.
I don't know who the hell you think you are, but you just made a big mistake.
Funny. I was gonna say the same thing, without the accent.
Robbie?
Take the stairs, find Agent Coulson.
Coulson?
It's time to pay for your sins.
Let's head back up, check it out.
Not smart to fire a gun in here.
That makes six.
No telling how many more are around.
They're like cockroaches, these guys.
Oh, Coulson.
Simmons.
Just in time.
What the hell are you doing here?
We came to find James. We thought he may be targeted by the Watchdogs, but...
“We?”
That's exactly why we're here. His GPS signal went out, so we came to his last recorded location and found it overrun with these guys.
They've got to be here somewhere!
James turned on us. He's working with the Watchdogs.
Then it's a good thing we brought Robbie Reyes. Fight fire with fire. That's a saying, isn't it?
I won't let you take me yet! I will be the last one to die.
Did two fire dudes just drop into a warehouse full of fireworks?
You had to see that coming. Let's go! Go, go, go, go, go!
